This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
At the start of battle, all enemies take [Arg3]% more {Tentacle DMG}. This effect doubles against {Aequor} enemies. The DMG dealt by {Lightning Retribution} to {Aequor} enemies +[Arg4]%.
